title: [bug]: go install github.com/containers/skopeo/cmd/skopeo@v1.14.2 fails
body:
Command output:

```
# github.com/containers/image/v5/signature                                                
go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/image/v5@v5.29.2/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:18:22: undefined: gpgme.Context
go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/image/v5@v5.29.2/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:72:50: undefined: gpgme.Context
go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/image/v5@v5.29.2/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:73:20: undefined: gpgme.New
go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/image/v5@v5.29.2/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:77:33: undefined: gpgme.ProtocolOpenPGP
go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/image/v5@v5.29.2/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:81:34: undefined: gpgme.ProtocolOpenPGP
go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/image/v5@v5.29.2/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:103:26: undefined: gpgme.NewDataBytes
go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/image/v5@v5.29.2/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:132:26: undefined: gpgme.NewDataBytes
go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/image/v5@v5.29.2/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:137:24: undefined: gpgme.NewDataWriter
go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/image/v5@v5.29.2/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:156:41: undefined: gpgme.PinEntryLoopback
go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/image/v5@v5.29.2/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:161:31: undefined: gpgme.Key
go/pkg/mod/github.com/containers/image/v5@v5.29.2/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:161:31: too many errors
```

Any suggestions?

```
uname -a
Linux VD012108 5.15.133.1-microsoft-standard-WSL2 #1 SMP Thu Oct 5 21:02:42 UTC 2023 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux
```
```
go env
GO111MODULE=''
GOARCH='amd64'
GOBIN='/home/user/go/bin'
GOCACHE='/home/user/.cache/go-build'
GOENV='/home/user/.config/go/env'
GOEXE=''
GOEXPERIMENT=''
GOFLAGS='-count=1'
GOHOSTARCH='amd64'
GOHOSTOS='linux'
GOINSECURE=''
GOMODCACHE='/home/user/go/pkg/mod'
GONOPROXY='github.com/internal'
GONOSUMDB='github.com/internal'
GOOS='linux'
GOPATH='/home/user/go'
GOPRIVATE='github.com/internal'
GOPROXY='direct'
GOROOT='/usr/local/go'
GOSUMDB='sum.golang.org'
GOTMPDIR=''
GOTOOLCHAIN='auto'
GOTOOLDIR='/usr/local/go/pkg/tool/linux_amd64'
GOVCS=''
GOVERSION='go1.21.1'
GCCGO='gccgo'
GOAMD64='v1'
AR='ar'
CC='gcc'
CXX='g++'
CGO_ENABLED='0'
GOMOD='/dev/null'
GOWORK=''
CGO_CFLAGS='-O2 -g'
CGO_CPPFLAGS=''
CGO_CXXFLAGS='-O2 -g'
CGO_FFLAGS='-O2 -g'
CGO_LDFLAGS='-O2 -g'
PKG_CONFIG='pkg-config'
GOGCCFLAGS='-fPIC -m64 -fno-caret-diagnostics -Qunused-arguments -Wl,--no-gc-sections -fmessage-length=0 -ffile-prefix-map=/tmp/go-build3009710143=/tmp/go-build -gno-record-gcc-switches'
```

Many thanks!

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

Read the relevant portion of https://github.com/containers/skopeo/blob/main/install.md , that should help.

Thank you for your fast response, however getting the same output.

```
git clone https://github.com/containers/skopeo $GOPATH/src/github.com/containers/skopeo
cd $GOPATH/src/github.com/containers/skopeo && make bin/skopeo
Cloning into '/home/user/go/src/github.com/containers/skopeo'...
remote: Enumerating objects: 47594, done.
remote: Counting objects: 100% (824/824), done.
remote: Compressing objects: 100% (528/528), done.
remote: Total 47594 (delta 236), reused 794 (delta 232), pack-reused 46770
Receiving objects: 100% (47594/47594), 46.92 MiB | 6.37 MiB/s, done.
Resolving deltas: 100% (26512/26512), done.
make: go: Permission denied
make: go: Permission denied
go build  -ldflags '-X main.gitCommit=de7e8dbfa1fe38eeb34434bdff2040dc2afdac15 ' -gcflags "" -tags "btrfs_noversion exclude_graphdriver_btrfs libdm_no_deferred_remove " -o bin/skopeo ./cmd/skopeo
# github.com/containers/image/v5/signature
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:18:22: undefined: gpgme.Context
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:72:50: undefined: gpgme.Context
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:73:20: undefined: gpgme.New
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:77:33: undefined: gpgme.ProtocolOpenPGP
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:81:34: undefined: gpgme.ProtocolOpenPGP
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:103:26: undefined: gpgme.NewDataBytes
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:132:26: undefined: gpgme.NewDataBytes
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:137:24: undefined: gpgme.NewDataWriter
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:156:41: undefined: gpgme.PinEntryLoopback
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:161:31: undefined: gpgme.Key
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:161:31: too many errors
make: *** [Makefile:135: bin/skopeo] Error 1
```

Yes Sir. 

```
Reading package lists... Done
Building dependency tree... Done
Reading state information... Done
libassuan-dev is already the newest version (2.5.5-1build1).
libbtrfs-dev is already the newest version (5.16.2-1).
libdevmapper-dev is already the newest version (2:1.02.175-2.1ubuntu4).
pkg-config is already the newest version (0.29.2-1ubuntu3).
libgpgme-dev is already the newest version (1.16.0-1.2ubuntu4.1).
0 upgraded, 0 newly installed, 0 to remove and 6 not upgraded.
```

It has to do with the internally used golang lib.

I’m sorry, that’s my mistake… I suspect that’s `CGO_ENABLED='0'` — that library is dependent on CGo.

I thought that compiling a CGo-requiring code with CGo disabled would fail, but the actual behavior is that just the relevant file is ignored.

Thank you very much kind Sir! That was indeed the problem. It did not crossed my mind. Should I mention it in your install.md or you would like to take care of it? 

Best Regards.

Thanks for the confirmation, and I apologize for not diagnosing it correctly initially.

A PR for `install.md` would be great.
